title: centaurea pullata var. acaulis
intro: Centaurea pullata var. acaulis, also known as the stemless star thistle, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family characterized by its small, star-shaped flowers and unique habit of growing without a stem. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Centaurea pullata var. acaulis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
